originalTitle: Google is letting social media stars customize their search result page
summary: Google now lets big creators and publishers in the US claim dedicated profiles in Search to highlight things like videos, articles, and their other profiles online. But this feature won't be available to most people or organizations; Google is limiting it to people with at least 100,000 YouTube subscribers, 100,000 followers on Instagram or X, […]
content: Google now lets big creators and publishers in the US claim dedicated profiles in Search to highlight things like videos, articles, and their other profiles online. But this feature won’t be available to most people or organizations; Google is limiting it to people with at least 100,000 YouTube subscribers, 100,000 followers on Instagram or X, or 300,000 followers on TikTok. You’ll need to meet the minimum on one of those platforms and be at least 18 years old to make a Search profile. In demo videos, Google shows how a Search profile can feature links to websites and other platforms, a short summary of the person or brand, pinned media from places like TikTok and Instagram, and a feed aggregating posts from multiple platforms. We’ve already made a profile for The Verge — check it out and follow us! [Media: https://twitter.com/UpdatesFromYT/status/2062599042140622944] Google already has knowledge panels that pop up for notable people and publications, but these new profiles offer those people and publications more control over what’s shown. They also offer an alternative to dedicated link-in-bio services like Linktree that creators already use to aggregate their various online presences into one place.
chineseTitle: 谷歌允许社交媒体明星定制他们的搜索结果页面
chineseSummary: 谷歌现在允许美国的大型创作者和出版商在搜索中声明专用的个人资料，以突出显示视频、文章和其他在线个人资料等内容。但大多数人或组织无法使用此功能；谷歌将其限制为至少拥有 100,000 个 YouTube 订阅者、在 Instagram 或 X 上拥有 100,000 个关注者的用户，[...]
chineseContent: 谷歌现在允许美国的大型创作者和出版商在搜索中声明专用的个人资料，以突出显示视频、文章和其他在线个人资料等内容。但大多数人或组织无法使用此功能；谷歌将其限制为在 YouTube 上拥有至少 10 万订阅者、在 Instagram 或 X 上拥有至少 10 万粉丝、或者在 TikTok 上拥有 30 万粉丝的用户。您需要满足这些平台之一的最低要求，并且年满 18 岁才能创建搜索个人资料。在演示视频中，谷歌展示了搜索个人资料如何提供网站和其他平台的链接、个人或品牌的简短摘要、来自 TikTok 和 Instagram 等地方的固定媒体，以及聚合来自多个平台的帖子的提要。我们已经为 The Verge 创建了个人资料 - 请查看并关注我们！ [媒体：https://twitter.com/UpdatesFromYT/status/2062599042140622944]谷歌已经为知名人士和出版物提供了知识面板，但这些新的个人资料为这些人和出版物提供了对所显示内容的更多控制权。他们还提供了专用链接生物服务（例如 Linktree）的替代方案，创作者已经使用 Linktree 将其各种在线存在聚合到一个地方。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
